The [[Delvin Constructs/Legends|Delvin Constructs]] Model '''Edu I-73''' was a training facility used by [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] to train [[Alliance Special Forces/Legends|Rebel Infiltrators]]. A standard design facility, Edu I-73 was constructed by the infiltrator trainees on their training grounds set up on remote worlds as part of their training with prefabricated materials supplied by [[Delvin Constructs/Legends|Delvin Constructs]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Empire at War]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[Star Wars: Empire at War: Forces of Corruption]]''
